reasoning: EMOTIONAL (60%): The button face uses two dot-eyes and a horizontal/slightly downward mouth that reads as neutral-to-melancholic — not charming or friendly. The gold decorative border provides warmth, but the overall palette is desaturated beige/cream/brown with no saturated greens, blues, or pinks that define the bright Hyrule toy-diorama mood. The round face silhouette has friendly potential but the expression undermines it. Emotional score ~4/10. TECHNICAL (40%): 1px hard outlines are present and pixel-grid-snapped with no visible anti-aliasing — solid pass on those axes. However, the inner panel shading is very flat (essentially 1 tone), failing the 2-3 tone hard-shading requirement. The frame has slightly more tonal variation but still minimal. Technical score ~7/10. Weighted: 0.6*4 + 0.4*7 = 2.4+2.8 = 5.2 → 5.
